args.query:
SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
FROM tracks
WHERE lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe maginnis%'
  AND lower(title) LIKE '%street hype%';

exec_args.sql:
SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
FROM tracks
WHERE lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe maginnis%'
  AND lower(title) LIKE '%street hype%';

args.query:
SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
FROM tracks
WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%street hype%'
ORDER BY artist, album, year
LIMIT 200;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
FROM tracks
WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%street hype%'
ORDER BY artist, album, year
LIMIT 200;

args.query:
SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
FROM tracks
WHERE lower(artist) LIKE '%maginnis%'
ORDER BY title, artist
LIMIT 200;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
FROM tracks
WHERE lower(artist) LIKE '%maginnis%'
ORDER BY title, artist
LIMIT 200;

args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist FROM tracks WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%street%' AND lower(artist) LIKE '%brucq%' LIMIT 200;

exec_args.sql: SELECT track_id, title, artist FROM tracks WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%street%' AND lower(artist) LIKE '%brucq%' LIMIT 200;

args.query: SELECT count(*) AS cnt FROM tracks;

exec_args.sql: SELECT count(*) AS cnt FROM tracks;

args.query: SELECT artist, count(*) AS cnt FROM tracks WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%street hype%' GROUP BY artist ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 50;

exec_args.sql: SELECT artist, count(*) AS cnt FROM tracks WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%street hype%' GROUP BY artist ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 50;

args.query: SELECT title, count(*) AS cnt FROM tracks WHERE lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe%' GROUP BY title ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 50;

exec_args.sql: SELECT title, count(*) AS cnt FROM tracks WHERE lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe%' GROUP BY title ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 50;

args.query:
SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS revenue_usd
FROM sales
WHERE track_id IN (4122,4628,14080,13758)
GROUP BY store
ORDER BY revenue_usd DESC;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS revenue_usd
FROM sales
WHERE track_id IN (4122,4628,14080,13758)
GROUP BY store
ORDER BY revenue_usd DESC;
